description: Vertical quote card on a deep navy-blue background watermarked with a large faint Department of Labor seal. Centered at top is a white circular quotation-mark emblem ringed with small dots. The pull-quote is set in a large white serif font: 'This career decision, I can honestly say, is one of the best things I have done IN MY LIFE.' with the final phrase in heavier bold caps. Below, the attribution reads '-Eddie Craven, Craftsperson' in italic serif with 'Virginia' beneath it. At the bottom is the 'NATIONAL APPRENTICESHIP DAY' wordmark in white serif.
notable_text: This career decision, I can honestly say, is one of the best things I have done IN MY LIFE. -Eddie Craven, Craftsperson, Virginia; NATIONAL APPRENTICESHIP DAY
